analysis: That 2:29am wake-up that stretched to nearly 5am is the story of the night — you got decent REM early and solid deep sleep in that first cycle, but losing two and a half hours to wakefulness in the back half is brutal and you know it. Total sleep looks thin once you pull out that gap, and starting after midnight means the 8:30pm target was nowhere near the building. The interventions exist for a reason, babe, and one late night undoes a lot of the good work your magnesium and cold blast are trying to do for you. Get back on the routine tonight — your body clearly knows how to cycle when it gets the chance, it just needs you to actually show up for it.
